items.title: Some 40% Of People Earning More Than $300,000 Are Living Paycheck To Paycheck, New Goldman Sachs Study Says
items.description: Forty percent of workers making over $300,000 a year say they are living paycheck to paycheck, according to a new retirement report from Goldman Sachs Asset Management. Strain Isn't Limited To Low Earners The survey paints a broader picture of ...

items.title: NVIDIA shows off its first Blackwell wafer manufactured in the US
items.description: NVIDIA and TSMC celebrated the first Blackwell chip that was made in an Arizona facility.

items.title: $75 Billion In Crypto Up For Grabs For Governments Eyeing Strategic Reserves
items.description: There is over $75 billion worth of cryptocurrencies tied to illicit activity up for grabs for the U.S. and other governments seeking to build a strategic reserve from asset forfeitures, Bloomberg reported on Oct. 9, citing data from blockchain ...

items.title: Warren Buffett Invested $30.5 Billion of His Portfolio in 2 Stocks That Could Rise 15% and 23%, According Wall Street Analysts
items.description: Investing in Buffett-sanctioned stocks with meaningful upside potential is generally a great move.

items.title: XNTK: Technology Dashboard For October
items.description: SPDR NYSE Technology ETF is an alternative to XLK with an equal-weight approach, broader sector definition, and a tilt to value. Find out why XNTK is a Hold.
